category_sources: Official entr homepage says it runs arbitrary commands when files change: https://eradman.com/entrproject/
source_facts.description says Run arbitrary commands when files change.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and GitHub repository use entr: https://eradman.com/entrproject/
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation and examples: https://github.com/eradman/entr#readme.
Official homepage provides usage examples and links to man page/downloads: https://eradman.com/entrproject/.
repo_sources: Official entr homepage links its overview to https://github.com/eradman/entr, and the GitHub README identifies the Event Notify Test Runner.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says entr runs arbitrary commands when files change using kqueue or inotify: https://github.com/eradman/entr#readme.
Official GitHub topics include test-automation, inotify, and kqueue.
